sizing_rule.note: Use full position size only when Maximum Adverse Excursion validates at <20% of initial stop distance. This is a conditional gate: position enters at full size if MAE < 20% × stop_distance; otherwise reduce or skip. Acts as a stop-validation filter before sizing commitment.

source_rule_text: A trader should use Maximum Adverse Excursion (MAE) as a diagnostic metric to validate that initial stops are appropriately sized relative to normal price oscillation, ensuring stops are neither too tight (catching noise) nor misaligned with actual trade drawdowns.
